description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a global before_script executing `ls -l`. Define a job named `build_gfeatures` (default stage `test`) that runs the Gradle wrapper with `./gradlew`. Configure this job to publish artifacts named `gFeaturesBungee_${CI_JOB_NAME}_${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}` from the `build/libs` directory, with `untracked` set to false. No specific Docker image, services, caches, or rules are defined, so the pipeline uses the default runner settings.
